title: 1000SA SELF Adhesive Waterproof HYLOAD TANKING Membrane 20M X 1M
description: Cold applied, self-adhesive polymer modified bitumen damp proof membrane, which is tough, durable and fatigue resistant. Specification compliant with BS 8102. Can be used as fully bonded damp proof membrane and utilised within retaining wall construction. Hyload Tanking Membrane 1000SA is supplied in rolls 1.1 mm thick, 1m wide and 20m in length. Tough polyethylene carrier Polymer modified, self-adhesive bitumen coating Suitable for a range of substrates, cast concrete, brick and blockwork constructions Cold applied, no heating, simple, low labour cost Tough, durable, flexible and fatigue resistant Comprehensive range of accessories and ancillaries Full design and technical service Specification compliant with BS 8102: 2009
